AllowSimpleValue.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether determines whether a simple passcode is allowed.

MinimumPasscodeLength.description: Gets or sets specifies the minimum overall length of the passcode.

RequirePasscodeOnDevice.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether determines whether the user is forced to set a PIN.

minutesUntilFailedLoginReset.description: Gets or sets specifies the number of minutes that must pass after a failed login attempt before the failed login attempt-counter is reset.

pinHistory.description: Gets or sets when the user changes the passcode, it has to be unique within the last N entries in the history. Minimum value is 1, maximum value is 50.

Type.description: Gets or sets specifies the On Demand Action on the Domain.

Account.description: Gets or sets username used for authentication.

AssociatedDomains.description: Gets or sets list of associated domains.

BlueCoatCustomerID.description: Gets or sets customer ID for Blue Coat Connections.

CalendarDomains.description: Gets or sets list of calendar domains.

CommunicationServer.description: Gets or sets iP address or host name of VPN server.

ConnectAutomatically.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether enabled when PerAppVpn tag is set to true. Specifies if the VPN connection has to be made automatically.

ConnectionName.description: Gets or sets description of the VPN connection displayed on the device.

ConnectionType.description: Gets or sets determines the settings available in the payload for this type of VPN connection.

ContactsDomains.description: Gets or sets list of contacts domains.

Credential.description: Gets or sets the crtificate name for IKEv2.

CustomData.description: Gets or sets list of Custom data.

DeadPeerDetectionRate.description: Gets or sets dead peer detection rate for IKEv2. One of the following: None, Low(every 30 minutes), Medium(every 10 minutes), or High(every minute).

DiffieHellmanGroup.description: Gets or sets diffie Hellman group for IKEv2. One of the following: 1, 2, 5, 14, 15, 16, 17, 18, 19, 20, 21, or 31.

DisableMOBIKE.description: Gets or sets if set to 1, disables MOBIKE. Defaults to 0.

DisableRedirect.description: Gets or sets if set to 1, disables IKEv2 redirect. If not set, the IKEv2 connection would be redirected if a redirect request is received from the server. Defaults to 0.

EAPAccount.description: Gets or sets username used for EAP.

EAPCertificateUUID.description: Gets or sets a globally unique identifier for EAP certificate.

EAPCredential.description: Gets or sets the EAP crtificate name.

EAPPassword.description: Gets or sets password used for EAP.

EnableFallback.description: Gets or sets enable fallback for IKEv2. If true, enables a tunnel over cellular data to carry traffic that is eligible for WiFi Assist and also requires VPN. Enabling fallback requires that the server support multiple tunnels for a single user.

EnablePFS.description: Gets or sets set to 1 to enable Perfect Forward Secrecy (PFS) for IKEv2 Connections. Default is 0.

EnableVPNOnDemand.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether setting to true, enables VPN On-Demand feature for networks that user certificate based Authentication.

EncryptionAlgorithm.description: Gets or sets encryption algorithm for IKEv2. One of the following: DES, 3DES, AES-128, AES-256, AES-128-GCM, AES-256-GCM, or ChaCha20Poly1305.

EncryptionLevel.description: Gets or sets level of data encryption applied to the connection. 1: None, 2: Automatic, 3: Maximum Bit.

ExcludeLocalNetworks.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether routes all local network traffic outside VPN.

ExcludedDomains.description: Gets or sets list of excluded domains.

ExtendedAuthEnabled.description: Gets or sets set to 1 to enable EAP-only authentication (see AuthenticationMethod, above). Defaults to 0.

ExtendedAuthentication.description: Gets or sets extended authentication method for IKEv2. One of the following: UserNamePassword or Certificate.

GroupName.description: Gets or sets the name of the group to use.

IKEv2CertificateUUID.description: Gets or sets a globally unique identifier for the IKEv2 Certificate.

Identifier.description: Gets or sets identifier for the custom VPN connection.

IdentityCertificate.description: Gets or sets the crtificate name for IPSec.

IncludeAllNetworks.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether routes all traffic through VPN.

IncludeUserPIN.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether setting to true sends the device user's pin along with the authentication.

IntegrityAlgorithm.description: Gets or sets integrity algorithm for IKEv2. One of the following: SHA1-96, SHA1-160, SHA2-256, SHA2-384, or SHA2-512.

LifeTimeInMinutes.description: Gets or sets sA lifetime (rekey interval) in minutes. Valid values are 10 through 1440. Defaults to 1440 minutes.

LocalIdentifier.description: Gets or sets the identifier for the IKEv2 client in one of the following format: FQDN, UserFQDN, Addres, or ASN1DN.

LoginGroupOrDomain.description: Gets or sets domain name for VPN connection.

MachineAuthentication.description: Gets or sets the authentication mode for IPSec. 1: Shared Secret, 2: Certificate.

MailDomains.description: Gets or sets list of mail domains.

NATKeepAliveInterval.description: Gets or sets controls the interval over which Keepalive packets are sent by the device. The minimum value is 20 seconds. If no key is specified, the default is 20 seconds.

NATKeepAliveOffloadEnable.description: Gets or sets set to 1 to enable and 0 to disable NAT Keepalive offload for Always On VPN IKEv2 connections. Defaults to 1.

PerAppVpn.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether per-app VPN that needed to be configured on the device.

Port.description: Gets or sets the port number of the HTTP proxy.

PromptForPassword.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether when true, the user is prompted to privide the password on the device.

ProxyAutoDiscoveryEnable.description: Gets or sets proxy auto discovery enable.

ProxyPassword.description: Gets or sets the password used for authentication.

ProxyServer.description: Gets or sets the host name of the HTTP proxy.

ProxyServerAutoConfigURL.description: Gets or sets uRL to the location of the proxy auto-configuration file.

ProxyUsername.description: Gets or sets the username used for authentication.

Realm.description: Gets or sets authentication Realm, a grouping of authentication resources.

RemoteIdentifier.description: Gets or sets the remote identifier for IKEv2 in one of the following formats: FQDN, UserFQDN, Addres, or ASN1DN.

Role.description: Gets or sets the users role to access the network.

SAParameters.description: Gets or sets security Association parameter for IKEv2. One of the following: 1(IKE2) or 2(Child).

SafariDomains.description: Gets or sets list of Domains that should trigger this VPN connection in Safari.

SendAllTraffic.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether if true, all network traffic is sent over VPN.

ServerCertificateCommonName.description: Gets or sets common Name of the server certificate. This name is used to validate the certificate sent by the IKE server. If not set, the Remote Identifier will be used to validate the certificate.

ServerCertificateIssuerCommonName.description: Gets or sets common Name of the server certificate issuer. If set, this field will cause IKE to send a certificate request based on this certificate issuer to the server.

SharedSecret.description: Gets or sets the shared secret for this VPN account.

TLSMaximumVersion.description: Gets or sets the maximum TLS version to be used with EAP-TLS authentication. If no value is specified, the default maximum is 1.2.

TLSMinimumVersion.description: Gets or sets the minimum TLS version to be used with EAP-TLS authentication. If no value is specified, the default minimum is 1.0.

UseAlternativeiOS7Syntax.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether enable the option for VPN On Demand to work on iOS 7 devices by utilizing the new keys in the VPN profile.

UseConfigurationAttributeInternalIPSubne.description: Gets or sets if set to 1, negotiations should use IKEv2 Configuration Attribute INTERNAL_IP4_SUBNET and INTERNAL_IP6_SUBNET. Defaults to 0.

UseHybridAuthentication.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether specifies if a combination of Secret, Name and Certificate need to be used for Authentication.

UserAuthentication.description: Gets or sets authentication type for connection. 0: Password, 1: RSA SecurId.

VpnOnDemandModels.description: Gets or sets list of the VPN On Demand Action Parameters.

VpnPassword.description: Gets or sets the password used for authentication.

VpnUserAuthentication.description: Gets or sets vPN authentication method.

WebsensePassword.description: Gets or sets the Websense password.

WebsenseServer.description: Gets or sets the Websense Server.

WebsenseUsername.description: Gets or sets the Websense Username.

FullScreen.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether if true, runs the Web page in full screen mode.

Icon.description: Gets or sets the id for a PNG icon to be shown on the Home screen. Should be 59 x 60 pixels in size. If not specified, a white square will be shown.

Label.description: Gets or sets the name of the Web Clip as displayed on the Home screen.

PrecomposedIcon.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether if true, the icon is displayed without any visual effects.

Removable.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether if false, the web clip is unremovable.

URL.description: Gets or sets the URL that the Web Clip should open when clicked. The URL must begin with HTTP or HTTPS or it won't work.

AllowTrustExceptions.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether if true, allows a dynamic trust decision by the user.

AutoJoin.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether if true, the network is auto-joined on iOS 5+.

BypassCaptivePortal.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether if set to true, Captive Network detection will be bypassed when the device connects to the network on iOS 10+.

DisableAssociationMACRandomization.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether MAC randomization is disabled.

DisplayedOperatorName.description: Gets or sets the operator name to display when connected to this network on iOS 7+.

EAPFAST.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether if true, EAP-FAST is used for the Extensible Authentication Protocol.

EAPSIM.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether if true, EAP-SIM is used for the Extensible Authentication Protocol.

FastlaneQosMarking.description: Gets or sets fastlane QoS Marking 1 : Restrict QoS Marking, 2: Do Not Restrict QoS Marking.

HiddenNetwork.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether besides SSID, the device uses information such as broadcast type and encryption type to differentiate a network.

PEAP.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether if true, PEAP is used for the Extensible Authentication Protocol.

Password.description: Gets or sets sSID password (Pre-Shared Key).

ProvisionPAC.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether if true, allows PAC provisioning.

ProvisionPACAnonymously.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether if true, provisions the device anonymously.

ProxyPassword.description: Gets or sets the password used for authentication.

ProxyServer.description: Gets or sets the host name of the HTTP proxy.

ProxyServerPort.description: Gets or sets the port number of the HTTP proxy.

ProxyUrl.description: Gets or sets uRL to the location of the proxy auto-configuration file.

WhitelistSpecificApps.description: Gets or sets array of app bundle identifiers that will be whitelisted for L2 and L3 marking for traffic sent to the Wi-Fi network.

WiFiHotspot.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether if true, the network is treated as a hotspot on iOS 7+.

If not present, the system only adds previously-discovered kexts to the kernel cache. This value is available in macOS 11 and later.

SecurityInfo response, the device requests the Bootstrap Token from the MDM prior to executing this command. This value is available in macOS 11 and later.

If you forget your PIN you must contact Apple to unlock your device.

This will be the base class for all the Device Profiles pertaining to different Platforms(Android, Apple, etc.)

PostEvent.description: Gets or sets allows the application to use CoreGraphics APIs to send CGEvents to the system event stream. Must be either Allow or Disallow.

Reminders.description: Gets or sets allows the application access to reminders information managed by Reminders.app. Must be either Allow or Disallow.

ScreenCapture.description: Gets or sets disallows the application to access controls for screen capture and recording. It can only be denied.

SpeechRecognition.description: Gets or sets allows the application to use speech recognition capabilities.

StaticCode.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether if set to true, statically validate the code requirement.

SystemPolicyAllFiles.description: Gets or sets allows the application access to all protected files. Must be either Allow or Disallow.

SystemPolicyDesktopFolder.description: Gets or sets allows the application access to files on the Desktop.

SystemPolicyDocumentsFolder.description: Gets or sets allows the application access to files in Documents.

SystemPolicyDownloadsFolder.description: Gets or sets allows the application access to files in Downloads.

SystemPolicyNetworkVolumes.description: Gets or sets allows the application access to files on Network Volumes.

SystemPolicyRemovableVolumes.description: Gets or sets allows the application access to files on Removable Volumes.

SystemPolicySysAdminFiles.description: Gets or sets allows the application access to some files used in system administration. Must be either Allow or Disallow.

CertificateTrustCheck.description:
Gets or sets certificate Trust Check. Valid values are 0-3.
0 - certificate trust check is turned off.
1 - certificate trust check is turned on with no additional revocation checks.
2 - certificate trust check is turned on, plus a soft revocation check is performed.
3 - certificate trust check is turned on, plus a hard revocation check is performed.

WinRTPrivilegeElevationPayloadModel.description: Privilege Elevation Payload Resource for Windows Desktop Platform.

argumentRules.description:
Gets or sets JSON array of argument-based privilege elevation rules.
Format: JSON array of arrays, each containing [path, caseSensitive, arguments]
Example: [["C:\\App\\tool.exe", "Y", "/install"], ["C:\\Tool\\app.exe", "N", "/update"]].

elevateChildProcess.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether child processes of the elevated applications will also run with elevated privileges.

hashRules.description:
Gets or sets JSON array of hash-based privilege elevation rules.
Format: JSON array of arrays, each containing [path, hash]
Example: [["C:\\App\\tool.exe", "ABC123..."], ["C:\\Tool\\app.exe", "DEF456..."]].

messageDescription.description: Gets or sets the extended text displayed beneath the title.

messageTitle.description: Gets or sets the short heading shown at the top of the elevation message.

pathRules.description:
Gets or sets JSON array of path-based privilege elevation rules.
Format: JSON array of arrays, each containing [path]
Example: [["C:\\Program Files\\App1\\app.exe"], ["C:\\Program Files\\App2\\tool.exe"]].

privilegeElevationType.description:
Gets or sets the Privilege Elevation Type
0 - Default
1 - Path
2 - Hash
3 - Publisher
4 - Arguments
5 - PathUserInstalled.

publisherRules.description:
Gets or sets JSON array of publisher-based privilege elevation rules.
Format: JSON array of arrays, each containing [publisher]
Example: [["CN=Publisher1"], ["CN=Publisher2"]].

showMessageToUser.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to display a notification to users when an application is elevated.

PeakShiftBatteryThreshold.description:
Gets or sets this is a percentage-based number that follows the Windows reported battery life value.
The goal of this setting is to try and ensure that Peak Shift does not turn off charging
when the battery is in danger of running out of power.
If the Battery Threshold is reached, the system will switch to AC power ,even if the
system has not yet reached Peakshift End.
However, charging will not resume until Peak Shift Charge Start time is reached.
Note: Peak shift Battery threshold takes the value in the range between 15-100.

4 - AES CBC 256 Bit

Gets or sets bitlocker suspend custom end time List
'|' (pipe) separated values for the list of end times for bitlocker custom suspend type respectively for 'CustomSuspendStartTime'.
Example : 18/08/2015 06:30:15|18/08/2015 06:30:15|18/08/2015 06:30:15.

Gets or sets bitlocker suspend custom start time List
'|' (pipe) separated values for the list of start times for bitlocker custom suspend type.

hideAppList.description: Allows IT Admins to configure Start by collapsing or removing the all apps list.

hideChangeAccountSettings.description: Allows IT Admins to configure Start by hiding "Change account settings" from appearing in the user tile.

hideFrequentlyUsedApps.description: Allows IT Admins to configure Start by hiding most used apps.

hideHibernate.description: Allows IT Admins to configure Start by hiding "Hibernate" from appearing in the Power button.

hideLock.description: Allows IT Admins to configure Start by hiding "Lock" from appearing in the user tile.

hidePeopleBar.description: Allows IT Admins to remove the people icon from the taskbar as well as the corresponding settings toggle. It also prevents users from pinning people to the taskbar.

hidePowerButton.description: Allows IT Admins to configure Start by hiding the Power button from appearing.

hideRecentJumplists.description: Allows IT Admins to configure Start by hiding recently opened items in the jumplists from appearing.

hideRecentlyAddedApps.description: Allows IT Admins to configure Start by hiding recently added apps.

hideRestart.description: Allows IT Admins to configure Start by hiding "Restart" and "Update and restart" from appearing in the Power button.

hideShutDown.description: Allows IT Admins to configure Start by hiding "Shut down" and "Update and shut down" from appearing in the Power button.

hideSignOut.description: Allows IT Admins to configure Start by hiding "Sign out" from appearing in the user tile.

hideSleep.description: Allows IT Admins to configure Start by hiding "Sleep" from appearing in the Power button.

hideSwitchAccount.description: Allows IT Admins to configure Start by hiding "Switch account" from appearing in the user tile.

hideUserTile.description: Allows IT Admins to configure Start by hiding the user tile.

importEdgeAssets.description: Allows IT Admins to  import Edge assets for secondary tiles into its local app data path .

lockScreenImage.description: Allows IT admin to set image to be used as Lock Screen Image. Upload image file to blob and provide the blobID.

noPinningToTaskbar.description: Allows IT Admins to configure the taskbar by disabling pinning and unpinning apps on the taskbar.

startLayout.description: Allows IT admin to set the start layout xml for the payload.  Upload xml file to blob and provide the blobID.

WindowsDesktopSingleAppModePayloadEntity.description:
The windows desktop single app mode payload entity.
By installing an application lock payload, the device is locked into a single application until the payload is removed.
The Policy is applied to a Standard User on the device. The Standard User must be a Local User. Domain Accounts are not supported.
The policy will be enabled after a device reboot.

assignment_uuids.description: The assignment UUIDs to which this workflow is assigned.

assignments.description: Gets or sets a list of the assignment and smartgoups mappings.

can_delete.description: Gets or sets a bool indicating whether or not the user has delete permission on the workflow.

can_edit.description: Gets or sets a bool indicating whether or not the user has edit permission on the workflow.

created_by.description: Gets or sets the workflow created administrator uuid.

created_on.description: The date when the workflow was created.

device_type.description: Gets or sets the device type that the workflow targets.

implicit_workflow.description:
Gets or sets a value indicating whether the workflow was created on the fly during resource creation.
Intended for controlling the display of implicit workflows in console.

modified_on.description: Gets or sets the time the workflow was last modified.

organization_group_uuid.description: Gets or sets the Organization Group UUID of the workflows.

published_on.description: Gets or sets the time the workflow was last published.

workflow_entities.description: Gets or sets a list of the uuid of the entities contained within the workflow.

uuid.description: Gets or sets current objects UUID.

WorkflowStatusSummaryModel.description: The device count for every individual status.

count.description: The number of devices with the workflow status.

status_summary.description: A collection of workflow status summaries.

iOSSecurityDetailsV2Model.description: Contains security details specific to iOS platform

blockLevelEncryption.description: Indicates if blocklevel encryption is enabled or not

fileLevelEncryption.description: Indicates if filelevel encryption is enabled or not

passcodeLockGracePeriodSeconds.description: The user preference for the amount of time in seconds the device must be locked before unlocking requires the device passcode

post.description: Executes command for multiple devices identified by device uuid. Supported commands are Lock, SyncSensors (macOS only), and DeviceWipe.

parameters.description: The command to execute [Lock, DeviceWipe, SyncSensors].(Required)
parameters.name: commandName

requestBody.description:
Model containing list of device uuids and Unlock PIN.
            The **unlock_pin** is applicable only for the macOS devices and it is required for Lock and DeviceWipe commands. Warning - This device cannot be unlocked remotely and can only be unlocked using a 6-digit pin entered. Write this PIN down and store it in a safe place. If you forget your PIN you must contact Apple to unlock your device.
            The **sensor_name** is applicable only for macOS and Linux platform and it is required for the SyncSensors command.(Required)

400.description: 1. {400: Device is not enrolled.} 2. {5101: Command not found for the input device and command type.} 3. {5102: Command is not supported.} 4. {5102: Command is not supported for user enrolled devices.} 5. {6: Unlock PIN for macOS device must be 6 digits long} 6. {150099: The sensor names are required for the Sync Sensor command.}

404.description: Not Found 1. {8: Device not found}

422.description: 1. {1012: The field Message must be a string with a maximum length of 256. }

post.summary: New - Executes command for multiple devices identified by device uuid

post.description: Execute commands for specified device ID. Supported commands are ClearPasscode, DeviceWipe, Lock, SyncSensors (macOS only), enable-activation-lock (iOS and macOS only), logout-user (iOS only), delete-user (iOS only), user-list (iOS only), refresh-esim (iOS only), suspend-bitlocker (Windows only), resume-bitlocker (Windows only).

parameters.description: The command to execute [ClearPasscode, DeviceWipe, Lock, SyncSensors, delete-user, enable-activation-lock, logout-user, refresh-esim, user-list, suspend-bitlocker, resume-bitlocker].(Required)
parameters.name: commandName

parameters.description: Search by alternate ID type [MacAddress, Udid, SerialNumber, ImeiNumber, EasId].(Required)
parameters.name: searchBy

parameters.description: ID(Required)
parameters.name: id

requestBody.description:
Model containing option values to the API.
            The **unlock_pin** is applicable only for the macOS devices and it is required for Lock and DeviceWipe commands. Warning - This device cannot be unlocked remotely and can only be unlocked using a 6-digit pin entered. Write this PIN down and store it in a safe place. If you forget your PIN you must contact Apple to unlock your device.
            The **message** can be optionally provided for Lock which will be displayed on the device lock screen. Max allowed length is 256 chars.
            The **sensor_names** is applicable only for macOS and Linux platform and it is required for the SyncSensors command.(Required)

400.description: 1. {33: Feature is currently turned off.} 2. {400: Device is not enrolled.} 3. {5101: Command not found for the input device and command type.} 4. {5102: Command is not supported.} 5. {5100: The device is not eligible for {command}.} 6. {5100: WIPE_PROTECTED is supported only on Windows 10 version 1703 and above.} 7. {5102: Invalid remote wipe type.} 8. {5060: This feature is not supported for the operating system version on the device.} 9. {6: Invalid input - {parameter}.} 10.{5102: Command is not supported for user enrolled devices.} 11.{6209: DEP token is invalid.} 12.{6: Unlock PIN for macOS device must be 6 digits long} 13.{7014: Device is not a shared device.} 14.{7017: Managed Apple ID is required for the Delete User command.} 15.{7018: Given Managed Apple ID is not in a valid email address format.} 16.{150099: The sensor names are required for the Sync Sensor command.} 17.{5234: Device Hub Version present on device is not supported for this feature.}

404.description: 1. {8: Device not found}

422.description: 1. {6: Invalid searchby parameter.} 2. {1012: The field Message must be a string with a maximum length of 256. }

503.description: 1. {0: An unknown error occurred during processing the command.}

get.description:
Returns details of relevant devices belonging to an enrollment user matching specified criteria, where results are ranked/sorted using the specified orderby criteria with maximum pagesize limit of 500.
 If page size is greater than the maximum limit, it will return the first 500 records.
seensince and lastseen fields accept the following Valid DateTime formats :
yyyy/MM/dd, yyyy-MM-dd, MM/dd/yyyy, MM-dd-yyyy, yyyy/MM/dd HH:mm:ss.fff,
yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.fff, MM/dd/yyyy HH:mm:ss.fff, MM-dd-yyyy HH:mm:ss.fff, yyyy/MM/ddTHH:mm:ss.fff,
yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.fff, MM/dd/yyyyTHH:mm:ss.fff, MM-dd-yyyyTHH:mm:ss.fff, yyyy-MM-dd HH-mm-ss-tt,
yyyy-MM-ddTHH-mm-ss-tt.

parameters.description: Filters devices based on enrolled username.
parameters.name: user

parameters.description: Filters devices based on model. For example iPhone.
parameters.name: model

parameters.description: Filters devices based on platform. For example Apple.
parameters.name: platform

parameters.description: Filters devices based on date when they were last seen.
parameters.name: lastseen

parameters.description: Filters devices based on ownership type. One of C, E, S or Undefined.
parameters.name: ownership

parameters.description: Limits the search to given OrganizationGroup, defaults to user's OrganizationGroup.
parameters.name: lgid

parameters.description: Filters devices based on specified compliance status. Possible values are true (for Compliant) and false (for NonCompliant).
parameters.name: compliance_status

parameters.description: Filters devices based on the date when they were seen after the given date.
parameters.name: seen_since

parameters.description: Filters search result to return results based on page number. Page numbering is 0 based and omitting this parameter will return first page.
parameters.name: page

parameters.description: Limits the number of search results per page. Defaults to 500.
parameters.name: pagesize

parameters.description: Sort results based on given field. One of model, lastseen, ownership, platform, deviceid etc. Defaults to deviceid.
parameters.name: orderby

parameters.description: Sort order of results. One of ASC or DESC. Defaults to ASC.
parameters.name: sortorder

400.description: 1.{6: Organization Group with id : {0} not found or Admin user does not have access to it.}

get.summary: New - Find relevant devices using various criteria.

patch.description:
Partially updates Smart Group criteria by adding/removing rules and/or values to rules like Organization groups, user groups, etc.                         
------------Example--------------  
[
  {op: "add", path: "/smartGroupsOperationsV2/organizationGroups", value: "069DC0E2-D4E2-E611-8114-005056AF67FF, 069DC0E2-D4E2-E611-8114-005056AF67FF"},
  {op: "remove", path: "/smartGroupsOperationsV2/users", value: "069DC0E2-D4E2-E611-8114-005056AF67FF, 069DC0E2-D4E2-E611-8114-005056AF67FF"},
  {op: "add", path: "/smartGroupsOperationsV2/devices", value: "069DC0E2-D4E2-E611-8114-005056AF67FF"},
  {op: "add", path: "/smartGroupsOperationsV2/tags", value: "123, 345"},
  {op: "remove", path: "/smartGroupsOperationsV2/platforms", value: "WindowsMobile, Apple, BlackBerry, Android, Athena, Motorola, WindowsPhone, WindowsPc, AppleOsX, WindowsPhone8, WinRT, BlackBerry10, AppleTv, Qnx, ChromeBook, ChromeOS"},
  {op: "add", path: "/smartGroupsOperationsV2/managementTypes", value: "MdmEnrolled"},
  {op: "add", path: "/smartGroupsOperationsV2/enrollmentCategories", value: "DepEnrolled, AndroidEnterprise"},
  {op: "add", path: "/smartGroupsOperationsV2/cpuArchitectures", value: "049892B1-BCFE-447A-B34C-52D2BE897715, 1D88CEFE-8959-4E26-BD0C-355889B14378"},
  {op: "add", path: "/smartGroupsOperationsV2/modelfamily", value: "123, 345"},
  {op: "remove", path: "/smartGroupsOperationsV2/modelfamily", value: "123, 345"}
]     
-----------Platforms--------------  
"WindowsMobile, Apple, BlackBerry, Android, Athena, Motorola, WindowsPhone, WindowsPc, AppleOsX, WindowsPhone8, WinRT, BlackBerry10, AppleTv, Qnx, ChromeBook, ChromeOS"
-----------Ownerships-------------    

 "CorporateDedicated, CorporateShared, EmployeeOwned, AllOwnerships"
 
 ----------ManagementTypes-------
 
 "MdmEnrolled, ApplicationManaged, All"
 
 ----------EnrollmentCategories---
 
 "DepEnrolled, Supervised, UserApprovedMdmEnrolled, SharedIpad, EduShared, AndroidLegacy, AndroidEnterprise, AadEnrolled, CustomDpcWorkManaged, CustomDpcCope, CustomDpcWorkProfile, AMAPI, AMAPIWorkManaged, AMAPICope, AMAPIWorkProfile, All"

 --- Get all CPU Architectures API /processor-architectures
